signals.label: headline finding
signals.deltaText: 10 exact (lat,lng) duplicate groups on 19,585 public stations — each row in §1 is one coordinate pair your registry team can grep today.

signals.label: headline finding
signals.deltaText: 290 cells exceed designed capacity — §1 lists H3 indices + map centers for your ops queue.

signals.label: headline finding
signals.deltaText: 50.69% of UI-reported HONEY sits in the top 20 visible SPL accounts (Solana RPC cap) — economic *shape* for treasury/MM review, not a contributor GPS read.
signals.publicSource: Solana mainnet HONEY SPL mint (public RPC)

signals.label: headline finding
signals.deltaText: Of 158,315 DIMO vehicle identities, 40,622 (25.7%) are backed by physical hardware; 31,420 (19.8%) connect via software/synthetic devices, and 86,273 (54.5%) show no connected device on the public registry.

signals.label: headline finding
signals.deltaText: 4,858 single-coordinate stacks of ≥10 hotspots on 1,008,126 located units — the largest stack holds 502 hotspots on one coordinate (§1 lists keys your registry team can grep today).

signals.label: headline finding
signals.deltaText: 528 single-coordinate stacks of ≥10 hotspots on 54,842 located units — the largest stack holds 497 hotspots on one coordinate (§1 lists keys your registry team can grep today).
